_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
reference_document_element_description: Conduct Transfer Impact Assessments for international data transfers, evaluating destination country legal frameworks against originating jurisdiction requirements and documenting supplementary safeguards where required.
comments: DCWF task superset of WIDAI RC domain. RC-T-009 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: RC-K-007 (RC, cosine: 0.459), SP-S-004 (SP, cosine: 0.452).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.8/10 (raw 0.579). Shared vocabulary: [conduct]. DCWF-only terms [checks, foreignness] vs WIDAI-only terms [against, assessments, country, data, destination, documenting] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.871 (P=0.910, R=0.835). P exceeds R by 0.075 — the DCWF element's 3 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 23 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.8%). "Conduct foreignness checks." and "Conduct Transfer Impact Assessments for international data transfers, evaluating" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.565 ≈ STS 0.579 (gap 0.014). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [conduct] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 4.0%. Shared tokens: [conduct]. DCWF-only: [checks, foreignness]. WIDAI-only: [against, assessments, country, data, destination, documenting].
